headline: Morgan Stanley Upgrades Franklin Resources to Equal-Weight, Raises Price Target to $31
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   upgrades Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) from Underweight to Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $21 to $31.
